task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface is visible in a web browser, showing the user logged in (e.g., admin avatar, workspace view, or administration options available).
The Rocket.Chat Administration sidebar or workspace dashboard is visible.
The 'Permissions' page within the Administration settings is displayed, showing a grid or table of permissions and roles.

task_completion.description: Locate the 'Create Channels' permission in the table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Create Channels' (or 'create-c') row is clearly visible in the permissions table.

task_completion.description: Remove the 'user' role from the 'Create Channels' permission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Create Channels' row, the checkbox corresponding to the 'user' role column is unchecked.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'admin' role retains the 'Create Channels' permission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Create Channels' row, the checkbox corresponding to the 'admin' role column remains checked.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rocket.Chat web GUI to modify permissions.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to localhost:3000 showing the Rocket.Chat UI, rather than a terminal window executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Rocket.Chat interface with standard web elements (menus, tables, checkboxes), not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no MongoDB shells, database GUI tools, or backend scripts visible in the screenshots used to alter the permissions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target permission to modify is 'Create Channels' (internal ID: create-c). The 'user' role must be removed from this permission. The 'admin' role must be kept for this permission.
